---
title: "check and display biodiversity maps"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
############################################################
# CHECK AND DISPLAY HMSC HOTSPOT OUTPUTS
# ----------------------------------------------------------
# This script:
#
# 2) Loads hotspot-analysis outputs for one model
# 3) Loads species-level predictive maps for display
# 4) Verifies raster geometry consistency
# 5) Prints summary statistics
# 6) Checks hotspot-stack logic
# 7) Displays key continuous, percentile, hotspot, domain,
#    species-level, and polygon outputs
#
############################################################

############################
# 1) SETUP
############################
library(terra)
library(viridis)

usr <- "VM"
source(file.path("..", "0_SourceFile.R"))

res <- "2km"
# Select model to inspect
nm <- "npp_and_fam_cafe"
# Selected species index for species-level display
species_index <- 19
```


```{r}
# Root directories
src_base <- file.path(usr.dropbox.dir,
  "data_products/predictive_maps/circum_antarctic")
dst_base <- file.path(usr.main.dir,
  "4_model_prediction/copy_of_predictive_maps/circum_antarctic")

# Environmental raster directory
env.derived <- file.path(usr.dropbox.dir,
  "data_environmental/derived")

# Model directory
model_root <- file.path(src_base, paste0("hmsc_with_", nm))

# Output subdirectories
cont_dir   <- file.path(model_root, "continuous")
pct_dir    <- file.path(model_root, "percentiles")
hot_dir    <- file.path(model_root, "hotspots")
domain_dir <- file.path(model_root, "domains")
poly_dir   <- file.path(model_root, "polygons")

# Plot settings
mar <- c(1, 1, 1, 0)

# Regional plotting windows
AP.xlim <- c(-2800000, -1800000)
AP.ylim <- c(1350000, 2350000)

RS.xlim <- c(-800000, 500000)
RS.ylim <- c(-2350000, -1250000)

EA.xlim <- c(0, 2500000)
EA.ylim <- c(-2400000, -1000000)

zoom.xlim <- c(-500000, 500000)
zoom.ylim <- c(-2300000, -1300000)

############################
# 2) USE LOCAL COPY OF PREDICTIVE MAPS
############################
pred_base_dir <- dst_base
model_dir <- file.path(pred_base_dir, paste0("hmsc_with_", nm))
```

```{r}
############################
# 4) LOAD RASTERS
############################
# Environmental raster stack for plotting context
r.stack <- rast(file.path(env.derived,
  paste0("Circumpolar_EnvData_", res, "_shelf_mask_unscaled_variables.tif")))
r2 <- r.stack$depth

# Continuous outputs
richness_mean <- rast(file.path(cont_dir, "richness_mean.tif"))
richness_median <- rast(file.path(cont_dir, "richness_median.tif"))
richness_bootstrap_median <- rast(file.path(cont_dir, "richness_bootstrap_median.tif"))
richness_bootstrap_sd <- rast(file.path(cont_dir, "richness_bootstrap_sd.tif"))

abundance_mean <- rast(file.path(cont_dir, "abundance_mean.tif"))
abundance_median <- rast(file.path(cont_dir, "abundance_median.tif"))
abundance_median_100 <- rast(file.path(cont_dir, "abundance_median_100.tif"))
abundance_se <- rast(file.path(cont_dir, "abundance_se.tif"))

richness_per_abundance <- rast(file.path(cont_dir, "richness_per_abundance.tif"))
abundance_per_richness <- rast(file.path(cont_dir, "abundance_per_richness.tif"))

# Percentiles
richness_pct <- rast(file.path(pct_dir, "richness_percentiles.tif"))
abundance_pct <- rast(file.path(pct_dir, "abundance_percentiles.tif"))
biodiversity_pct <- rast(file.path(pct_dir, "biodiversity_percentiles.tif"))

richness_only_pct <- rast(file.path(pct_dir, "richness_only_percentile_difference.tif"))
abundance_only_pct <- rast(file.path(pct_dir, "abundance_only_percentile_difference.tif"))

richness_per_abundance_pct <- rast(file.path(pct_dir, "richness_per_abundance_percentiles.tif"))
abundance_per_richness_pct <- rast(file.path(pct_dir, "abundance_per_richness_percentiles.tif"))

# Hotspot stacks
richness_hot <- rast(file.path(hot_dir, "richness_hotspots.tif"))
abundance_hot <- rast(file.path(hot_dir, "abundance_hotspots.tif"))
biodiversity_hot <- rast(file.path(hot_dir, "biodiversity_hotspots.tif"))

# Richness-only and abundance-only class contrasts
richness_only_class <- rast(file.path(hot_dir, "richness_only_hotspots.tif"))
abundance_only_class <- rast(file.path(hot_dir, "abundance_only_hotspots.tif"))

# Domain percentile outputs
domain_richness_pct <- rast(file.path(domain_dir, "domain_richness_percentiles.tif"))
domain_abundance_pct <- rast(file.path(domain_dir, "domain_abundance_percentiles.tif"))
domain_biodiversity_pct <- rast(file.path(domain_dir, "domain_biodiversity_percentiles.tif"))

# Domain hotspot outputs
domain_richness_hot_top10 <- rast(file.path(domain_dir, "domain_richness_hotspot_top10.tif"))
domain_richness_hot_class <- rast(file.path(domain_dir, "domain_richness_hotspot_class.tif"))

domain_abundance_hot_top10 <- rast(file.path(domain_dir, "domain_abundance_hotspot_top10.tif"))
domain_abundance_hot_class <- rast(file.path(domain_dir, "domain_abundance_hotspot_class.tif"))

domain_biodiversity_hot_top10 <- rast(file.path(domain_dir, "domain_biodiversity_hotspot_top10.tif"))
domain_biodiversity_hot_class <- rast(file.path(domain_dir, "domain_biodiversity_hotspot_class.tif"))

# Species-level predictive maps for display
pa_files <- list.files(model_dir,
  pattern = "^PA_.*\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE)

pa_mean   <- rast(pa_files, lyrs = 1)
pa_median <- rast(pa_files, lyrs = 2)
pa_se     <- rast(pa_files, lyrs = 3)

if (species_index > nlyr(pa_median)) {
  stop("species_index exceeds the number of available species layers.")
}


############################
# 5) CHECK GEOMETRY CONSISTENCY
############################
check_geometry <- function(x, ref, nm) {
  data.frame(
    object = nm,
    same_nrow = nrow(x) == nrow(ref),
    same_ncol = ncol(x) == ncol(ref),
    same_res = all(res(x) == res(ref)),
    same_ext = all(ext(x) == ext(ref)),
    same_crs = crs(x) == crs(ref),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}
ref <- richness_median
geom_check <- rbind(
  check_geometry(richness_bootstrap_median, ref, "richness_bootstrap_median"),
  check_geometry(richness_bootstrap_sd, ref, "richness_bootstrap_sd"),
  check_geometry(abundance_median, ref, "abundance_median"),
  check_geometry(abundance_median_100, ref, "abundance_median_100"),
  check_geometry(abundance_se, ref, "abundance_se"),
  check_geometry(richness_pct, ref, "richness_pct"),
  check_geometry(abundance_pct, ref, "abundance_pct"),
  check_geometry(biodiversity_pct, ref, "biodiversity_pct"),
  check_geometry(richness_hot[[5]], ref, "richness_hot_intensity"),
  check_geometry(abundance_hot[[5]], ref, "abundance_hot_intensity"),
  check_geometry(biodiversity_hot[[5]], ref, "biodiversity_hot_intensity"),
  check_geometry(richness_only_class, ref, "richness_only_class"),
  check_geometry(abundance_only_class, ref, "abundance_only_class"),
  check_geometry(pa_median[[species_index]], ref, "selected_species_median"),
  check_geometry(pa_se[[species_index]], ref, "selected_species_se")
)
print(geom_check)
```


```{r}
############################
# 6) SUMMARY STATISTICS
############################
raster_summary <- function(x, nm) {
  vals <- values(x)
  data.frame(
    object = nm,
    n_non_na = sum(!is.na(vals)),
    min = min(vals, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(vals, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean = mean(vals, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(vals, na.rm = TRUE),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

summary_table <- rbind(
  raster_summary(richness_mean, "richness_mean"),
  raster_summary(richness_median, "richness_median"),
  raster_summary(richness_bootstrap_median, "richness_bootstrap_median"),
  raster_summary(richness_bootstrap_sd, "richness_bootstrap_sd"),
  raster_summary(abundance_mean, "abundance_mean"),
  raster_summary(abundance_median, "abundance_median"),
  raster_summary(abundance_median_100, "abundance_median_100"),
  raster_summary(abundance_se, "abundance_se"),
  raster_summary(richness_per_abundance, "richness_per_abundance"),
  raster_summary(abundance_per_richness, "abundance_per_richness"),
  raster_summary(richness_pct, "richness_pct"),
  raster_summary(abundance_pct, "abundance_pct"),
  raster_summary(biodiversity_pct, "biodiversity_pct"),
  raster_summary(richness_only_pct, "richness_only_pct"),
  raster_summary(abundance_only_pct, "abundance_only_pct"),
  raster_summary(richness_hot[[5]], "richness_hot_intensity"),
  raster_summary(abundance_hot[[5]], "abundance_hot_intensity"),
  raster_summary(biodiversity_hot[[5]], "biodiversity_hot_intensity"),
  raster_summary(richness_only_class, "richness_only_class"),
  raster_summary(abundance_only_class, "abundance_only_class"),
  raster_summary(pa_median[[species_index]], "selected_species_median"),
  raster_summary(pa_se[[species_index]], "selected_species_se")
)
print(summary_table)
# write.csv(summary_table,
#   file = file.path(model_root, paste0("qa_summary_", nm, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r}
############################
# 8) COMPARE RICHNESS MEDIANS
############################

# Relationship between summed richness median and bootstrap median
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
plot(
  values(richness_median),
  values(richness_bootstrap_median),
  pch = 16, cex = 0.3,
  xlab = "Richness median",
  ylab = "Richness bootstrap median",
  main = paste("Richness comparison:", nm)
)
abline(0, 1, col = "red", lwd = 2)
cor_val <- cor(
  values(richness_median),
  values(richness_bootstrap_median),
  use = "complete.obs"
)
message("Correlation between richness_median and richness_bootstrap_median: ",
        round(cor_val, 4))
```


```{r}
############################
# 9) PLOT KEY OUTPUTS
############################
# Zoom window used for quick visual checks
xlim <- zoom.xlim
ylim <- zoom.ylim
maxcell <- 10000000

# Continuous outputs
par(mfrow = c(2, 3), mar = c(2, 2, 2, 4))
plot(richness_median,           xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Richness median")
plot(richness_bootstrap_median, xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Richness bootstrap median")
plot(richness_bootstrap_sd,     xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Richness bootstrap SD")
plot(abundance_median_100,      xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Abundance median 100")
plot(abundance_se,              xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Abundance SE", range=c(0, 100))

# Additional continuous variables
par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(2, 2, 2, 4))
plot(richness_per_abundance, xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, mexcell=maxcell, main="morphospecies per %-cover", range=c(0, 6))
plot(abundance_per_richness, xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, mexcell=maxcell, main="%-cover per morphospecies", range=c(0, 6))

# Percentiles
par(mfrow = c(2, 3), mar = c(2, 2, 2, 4))
plot(richness_pct,               xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Richness percentiles")
plot(abundance_pct,              xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Abundance percentiles")
plot(biodiversity_pct,           xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Biodiversity percentiles")
plot(richness_only_pct,          xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Richness-only percentile diff")
plot(abundance_only_pct,         xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Abundance-only percentile diff")
plot(richness_per_abundance_pct, xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Richness / abundance percentiles")

# Hotspot classes
par(mfrow = c(2, 3), mar = c(2, 2, 2, 4))
plot(richness_hot[[5]],     xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Richness class")
plot(abundance_hot[[5]],    xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Abundance class")
plot(biodiversity_hot[[5]], xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Biodiversity class")
plot(richness_only_class,   xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Richness-only hotspots")
plot(abundance_only_class,  xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Abundance-only hotspots")

# Hotspot top-10 layers
par(mfrow = c(1, 3), mar = c(2, 2, 2, 4))
plot(richness_hot[[2]],     xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Richness top 10%")
plot(abundance_hot[[2]],    xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Abundance top 10%")
plot(biodiversity_hot[[2]], xlim=xlim, ylim=ylim, maxcell=maxcell, main="Biodiversity top 10%")
```


```{r}
############################
# 10) SPECIES-LEVEL DISPLAY
############################

# Presence-absence overview
par(mfrow = c(1, 1), mar = c(2, 2, 2, 4))
plot(richness_median, col = viridis(99), main = "Predicted richness (median)")

# Selected species
par(mfrow = c(1, 2), oma = c(2, 0, 2, 3))
plot(pa_median[[species_index]],
  main = names(pa_median)[species_index],
  mar = mar,
  legend = FALSE,
  col = viridis(99)
)

plot(pa_se[[species_index]],
  main = paste0(names(pa_median)[species_index], "_se"),
  mar = mar,
  col = viridis(99)
)

# Display all species sequentially if needed
# par(mfrow = c(1, 2), oma = c(2, 0, 2, 3))
# for (i in seq_len(nlyr(pa_median))) {
#   plot(pa_median[[i]],
#     main = names(pa_median)[i],
#     mar = mar,
#     legend = FALSE,
#     col = viridis(99)
#   )
#
#   plot(pa_se[[i]],
#     main = paste0(names(pa_median)[i], "_se"),
#     mar = mar,
#     col = viridis(99)
#   )
# }

# East Antarctica zoom for one selected species
par(mfrow = c(2, 1), bg = NA)
plot(pa_median[[species_index]],
  xlim = EA.xlim,
  ylim = EA.ylim,
  maxcell = 10000000,
  main = names(pa_median)[species_index],
  mar = mar,
  legend = FALSE,
  col = viridis(99)
)

plot(pa_se[[species_index]],
  xlim = EA.xlim,
  ylim = EA.ylim,
  maxcell = 10000000,
  main = paste0(names(pa_median)[species_index], "_se"),
  mar = mar,
  col = viridis(99)
)
```


```{r}
############################
# 11) REGIONAL SNAPSHOTS
############################

# Antarctic Peninsula
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
plot(richness_median,
  xlim = AP.xlim,
  ylim = AP.ylim,
  maxcell = 10000000,
  col = viridis(99),
  main = "Richness median - Antarctic Peninsula"
)

# Ross Sea
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
plot(richness_median,
  xlim = RS.xlim,
  ylim = RS.ylim,
  maxcell = 10000000,
  col = viridis(99),
  main = "Richness median - Ross Sea"
)

# East Antarctica richness zoom
par(mfrow = c(1, 1), bg = NA)
plot(richness_median,
  xlim = c(1000000, 3000000),
  ylim = c(-2400000, 1600000),
  maxcell = 10000000,
  col = viridis(99),
  axes = FALSE,
  main = "Richness median - East Antarctica"
)

# Optional export
# png(file.path(getwd(), "Circumpolar_richness_zoom.png"),
#   width = 2400, height = 2400, res = 300
# )
#
# par(mfrow = c(1, 1), bg = NA)
# plot(richness_median,
#   xlim = c(1000000, 3000000),
#   ylim = c(-2400000, 1600000),
#   maxcell = 10000000,
#   col = viridis(99),
#   axes = FALSE
# )
#
# dev.off()
```


```{r}
############################
# 12) PLOT DOMAIN OUTPUTS
############################

message("Domain layer names:")
print(names(domain_richness_pct))

par(mfrow = c(2, 3), mar = c(2, 2, 2, 4))
for (i in 1:nlyr(domain_richness_pct)) {
  plot(domain_richness_pct[[i]], main = names(domain_richness_pct)[i])
}

par(mfrow = c(2, 3), mar = c(2, 2, 2, 4))
for (i in 1:nlyr(domain_biodiversity_hot_class)) {
  plot(domain_biodiversity_hot_class[[i]], main = names(domain_biodiversity_hot_class)[i])
}

par(mfrow = c(2, 3), mar = c(2, 2, 2, 4))
for (i in 1:nlyr(domain_biodiversity_hot_top10)) {
  plot(domain_biodiversity_hot_top10[[i]], main = names(domain_biodiversity_hot_top10)[i])
}
```


```{r}
############################
# 13) OPTIONAL POLYGON CHECK
############################

poly_files <- c(
  file.path(poly_dir, "richness_top10_hotspots.gpkg"),
  file.path(poly_dir, "abundance_top10_hotspots.gpkg"),
  file.path(poly_dir, "biodiversity_top10_hotspots.gpkg")
)

poly_check <- data.frame(
  file = basename(poly_files),
  exists = file.exists(poly_files),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(poly_check)

if (file.exists(file.path(poly_dir, "biodiversity_top10_hotspots.gpkg"))) {
  biodiv_poly <- vect(file.path(poly_dir, "biodiversity_top10_hotspots.gpkg"))
  print(biodiv_poly)

  par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
  plot(biodiversity_hot[[5]], main = "Biodiversity hotspot class with polygon overlay")
  plot(biodiv_poly, add = TRUE, border = "red", lwd = 1)
}


############################
# 14) QUICK CHECKS I RECOMMEND
############################

message("Recommended checks:")
message("1) richness_median and richness_bootstrap_median should be strongly correlated")
message("2) richness_bootstrap_sd should be > 0 in much of the shelf but not dominated by extreme spikes")
message("3) abundance_median_100 should not exceed 100")
message("4) percentile rasters should span roughly 1 to 100")
message("5) hotspot stacks should be nested: top1 within top5, top5 within top10, top10 within top25")
message("6) hotspot intensity should equal the sum of top25, top10, top5 and top1")
message("7) domain layers should only contain values inside each planning domain")
```
